title: Juno (disambiguation)
content:
'''Juno''' could mean:

==Individuals==
*[[Juno (captain)|Juno]], a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Mere Resistance]]
*[[Juno (Fregan)|Juno]], a criminal from [[Frego]]
*[[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]], an Imperial officer

==Ships==
*[[Juno (freighter group)|Juno]], a group of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]]
*[[Juno (cargo ferry group)|Juno]] group, a collection of [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] [[cargo ferry]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]
*''[[Juno II]]'', a [[Marauder-class corvette|''Marauder''-class corvette]]

{{Disambig}}
